author: cokaizoku
description: Adds a panel that provides a global ticker for news and stock updates, using Currents and Finnhub APIs. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: COKAIZOKU
manifest.description: Adds a panel that provides a global ticker for news and stock updates, using Currents and Finnhub APIs.
manifest.name: Global Ticker

name: Global Ticker

releases.author: COKAIZOKU
releases.description:
# 1.0.1 - Small Refactor Changes

Third stable release of the Global Ticker plugin for Obsidian.

## Changes

- Changed hex color to color picker. 
- Added color customization to the headlines.

## Notes

- Requires free API keys for both Currents and Finnhub.
- Free API plans limit the number of headlines and requests.

## Requirements

- Obsidian v1.11.5 or newer, because of the keychain feature of Obsidian.
- Desktop version only.

## Tested on

- Obsidian v1.12.7 (desktop).

## Known Issues

- Some headlines may link to paywalled sources.
- Limited headline availability depending on API filters.
- Some elements may not display correctly when the panel size is too small.

releases.author: COKAIZOKU
releases.description:
# 1.0.0 - Initial Release

First stable release of the Global Ticker plugin for Obsidian.

## Added

- News ticker displaying global headlines via the Currents News API.
- Stock ticker displaying global market data via the Finnhub API.
- Independent enable/disable options for news and stocks.
- Scroll speed and direction controls.
- Manual and startup-based refresh options.
- Optional footers showing last refresh time and a quick refresh button.
- Persistent caching to keep last fetched data available offline.

## Notes

- Requires free API keys for both Currents and Finnhub.
- Free API plans limit the number of headlines and requests.

## Requirements

- Obsidian v1.11.5 or newer, because of the keychain feature of Obsidian.
- Desktop version only.

## Tested on

- Obsidian v1.11.7 (desktop).

## Known Issues

- Some headlines may link to paywalled sources.
- Limited headline availability depending on API filters.
- Some elements may not display correctly when the panel size is too small.
